page_title: Sponsor your parents and grandparents - Canada.ca

h2: New Ministerial Instructions for the Parents and Grandparents Program come into effect January 1, 2026

sections.heading: New Ministerial Instructions for the Parents and Grandparents Program come into effect January 1, 2026
items: These administrative steps allow us to keep processing existing applications into 2026. Details on the next intake will be shared on our website and social media channels as soon as they are available.

sections.heading: 2025 intake
items: Starting July 28, 2025, we invited potential sponsors who submitted an interest to sponsor form in 2020 to apply for the 2025 intake.
We sent 17,860 invitations over approximately 2 weeks. Our goal is to accept 10,000 complete applications.
The last day to apply was October 9, 2025. We’re no longer accepting applications.
